implementation_summary.summary: CP00-860 bridges the RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only fixture/golden-case tail into the permission matrix head across RP28.P05.M03.S19-RP28.P06.M00.S06 without executing fixture runtime, command replay, permission decisions, audit writes, product-state writes, or using real client data.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-860 RP28.P05.M03.S19-RP28.P06.M00.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

review_adjudication.p3_disposition: CP860-P3-01 is closed by running and recording the full validation suite after review and queue regeneration, before commit. CP860-P3-02 is closed by removing docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md from changed-file-scope untracked_implementation_files and keeping it only as unrelated preserved dirty context; active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted remains empty.
